note: This file provides last-resort fallback responses if BOTH Gemini and Groq fail during a live demo. These are realistic, pre-written outputs for a sample resume/role combo. Only returned after both providers have been tried and failed.

decayed_skills.reason: Library versions and best practices have evolved significantly in 3 years
Advanced querying techniques may need a refresh

new_since_left_skills.skill: AI-assisted data analysis tools (e.g. Copilot for Excel, ChatGPT for SQL generation)
Modern BI tools (Power BI updates, Looker Studio)
new_since_left_skills.reason: Significant feature updates since your last role

fallback_interview_questions.question: Can you walk me through how you would clean and prepare a messy dataset for analysis?
How would you decide between using a bar chart versus a line chart to present data to a non-technical stakeholder?
Tell me about a time you had to explain a complex data finding to someone without a technical background.
I noticed a gap in your work history over the past few years. Can you walk me through that time and how you've stayed engaged with the field?

fallback_interview_feedback.summary: Strong technical grounding and clear communication overall. The gap-explanation answer would benefit from a more confident, forward-looking framing rather than an apologetic tone.

fallback_gap_rewrite.original_answer: I took a break for about 3 years to take care of my family, so I haven't really worked during that time. I know it's been a while so I might be a bit rusty.
fallback_gap_rewrite.rewritten_answer: I took a 3-year career break to focus on my family, during which I also completed several self-paced courses in data analysis and stayed current with industry tools through independent projects. I'm returning with a strong foundation and a clear plan to quickly re-integrate into a fast-paced analytics role.

highlighted_changes.original_phrase: haven't really worked during that time
highlighted_changes.rewritten_phrase: also completed several self-paced courses and stayed current with industry tools

highlighted_changes.original_phrase: I might be a bit rusty
highlighted_changes.rewritten_phrase: returning with a strong foundation and a clear plan
